ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the position the employee holds */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the office where the employee works */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the employee */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary of the employee */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee left (if applicable) */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Status of the employee's employment (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "job_level" INTEGER /* Level of the employee within the organization (e.g., Junior, Senior) */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee's manager (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_title" TEXT /* Title of the position (e.g., Accountant, Developer) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department that holds the position */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the job requirements */,
  "responsibilities" TEXT /* List of key responsibilities associated with the position */,
  "required_skills" TEXT /* List of required skills for the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positions_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the office where the department is located */,
  "department_head_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department head (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offices" (
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each office */,
  "office_name" TEXT /* Name of the office */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the office */,
  "office_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the office manager (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee whose progress is being tracked */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project assigned to the employee */,
  "completion_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of completion of the project */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the last progress review */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_progress_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance review */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score given to the employee */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary_history" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary change record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee whose salary is changing */,
  "old_salary" REAL /* Previous salary amount */,
  "new_salary" REAL /* New salary amount */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of salary change */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for the salary change (e.g., promotion, cost-of-living adjustment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_history_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., HR Manager, Admin) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role's responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for account security */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role assigned to the user */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee associated with the account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "office_visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each office visit */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee visiting the office */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* ID of the office being visited */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the visit */,
  "visit_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the visit in hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_office_visits_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_office_visits_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainings" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "training_name" TEXT /* Name of the training session */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date of the training session */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the training in hours */,
  "trainer" TEXT /* Name of the trainer conducting the training */,
  "training_type" TEXT /* Type of training (e.g., onboarding, skills development) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_trainings" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee participating in the training */,
  "training_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training session */,
  "participation_status" TEXT /* Participation status (e.g., Completed, In Progress) */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Employee feedback on the training session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_trainings_training_id FOREIGN KEY ("training_id") REFERENCES trainings ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_trainings_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Status indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., performance review, training, general announcement) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee receiving the benefit */,
  "benefit_type" TEXT /* Type of benefit (e.g., health insurance, retirement plan) */,
  "benefit_provider" TEXT /* Name of the benefit provider */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the benefit becomes effective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benefits_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee associated with the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., ID, resume, contract) */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_documents_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_evaluation_criteria" (
  "criterion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation criterion */,
  "criterion_name" TEXT /* Name of the criterion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the criterion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("criterion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_evaluation_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation result record */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation the result belongs to */,
  "criterion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the criterion being evaluated */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score given for the criterion */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the evaluator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_evaluation_results_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES performance_reviews ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_evaluation_results_criterion_id FOREIGN KEY ("criterion_id") REFERENCES performance_evaluation_criteria ("criterion_id")
)
